creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, sadly I am going to close this PR, but i am also pointing you at 
the list that might be able to help you (Which is better suited for your 
request then the bug database): please visit 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions and 
subscribe there, then post the question to questions@FreeBSD.org and 
read the advise people are going to give. Hopefully someone will be able 
to assist you and guide you through the details needed. IF someone still 
considers this a bug-report, please report as much information as 
possible stating that something does not work while it is expected to do 
so with a boot-verbose, and pciconf -vl and possible usb device output 
(if this is an USB printer). Prior to that, please seek help on the 
mailinglist first, the bugdatabase is not for questions. THanks for 
using FreeBSD and taking the time to report this though!
